items.name: Zerobuilder
items.description: Fork of ZeroClaw: build production-quality web apps through natural conversation on Telegram (and Signal). Describe what you want, the agent plans it, you confirm, and get a live preview link. E2B MicroVM sandboxes, plan-before-build workflow, GitHub OAuth deploy. Master Agent (ZeroClaw Rust) + Builder Agent (Node.js). Hook up Telegram/Signal to make changes and deploy ZeroClaw on VPS via GitHub.

items.name: MobileClaw
items.description: Open-source ZeroClaw for Android devices, including automotive. Fast, small, fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure. Turns old Android phones into on-device control centers. Rust-first core, modular providers/channels/tools, 22+ providers, Telegram/Discord support. APK from GitHub Releases.
